baseOperatingPoint.description: Base fields common to all topology operating points
baseOperatingPoint.title: baseOperatingPoint

outputVoltages.description: List of output voltages, one per output. Interpreted per outputVoltagesType (default: dc). See docs/normative-references.md.

outputVoltagesType.description: Type of value carried in outputVoltages: which aggregate of the periodic waveform the number represents. Defaults to dc. See IEV 103-02 (values of a periodic quantity).

outputCurrents.description: List of output currents, one per output. Interpreted per outputCurrentsType (default: dc). See docs/normative-references.md.

outputCurrentsType.description: Type of value carried in outputCurrents: which aggregate of the periodic waveform the number represents. Defaults to dc. See IEV 103-02 (values of a periodic quantity).

switchingFrequency.description: Switching frequency of the operating point. Unit: Hz. See docs/units.md.

ambientTemperature.description: Ambient temperature of the operating point. Unit: Celsius. See docs/units.md.

wiringTechnology.description: Technology that must be used to create the wiring

application.description: Application of the magnetic, can be Power, Signal Processing, or Interference Suppression
application.title: application

subApplication.description: Sub application of the magnetic, can be Power Filtering, Transforming, Isolation, Common Mode Noise Filtering, Differential Mode Noise Filtering
subApplication.title: subApplication

resistivityPoint.description: data for describing one point of resistivity
resistivityPoint.title: resistivityPoint

temperature.description: Temperature for the field value, in Celsius.

irdi.description: International Registration Data Identifier per ISO/IEC 11179-6 / ISO 29002-5, in the form `RAI#DI#VI` where RAI is the registration-authority identifier (e.g. `0112` for IEC CDD, `0173-1` for ECLASS), DI the data identifier and VI the version identifier. MAS does not mint private IRDIs; populate only with values issued by an authoritative registry. See docs/normative-references.md.
irdi.title: irdi

manufacturerInfo.description: Data from the manufacturer for a given part

name.description: The name of the manufacturer of the part

irdi.description: Optional International Registration Data Identifier (per ISO/IEC 11179-6) issued by an authoritative registry such as IEC CDD or ECLASS. When populated, this is the canonical machine-readable identifier for the part class.

status.description: The production status of a part according to its manufacturer

description.description: The description of the part according to its manufacturer

reference.description: The manufacturer's reference of this part

orderCode.description: The manufacturer's order code of this part

family.description: The family of a magnetic, as defined by the manufacturer

datasheetUrl.description: The manufacturer's URL to the datasheet of the product

cost.description: The manufacturer's reference price for this part.

distributorInfo.description: Data from the distributor for a given part
distributorInfo.title: distributorInfo

name.description: The name of the distributor of the part

country.description: The country of the distributor of the part

distributedArea.description: Geographical area in which the distributor operates.

reference.description: The distributor's reference of this part

quantity.description: The number of individual pieces available in the distributor

updatedAt.description: The date that this information was updated

cost.description: The distributor's price for this part.
A monetary value with an explicit currency (ISO 4217 code).
cost.title: cost

currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code, e.g. EUR, USD, CNY, JPY.

rotation.description: Euler angle triplet [rx, ry, rz] describing the rotation around each cartesian axis, in radians

coordinates.description: Coordinates in 2D or 3D space. Interpretation depends on the sibling coordinateSystem (default: cartesian). Cartesian: (x, y) or (x, y, z). Polar (2D only): (r, theta). Cylindrical (3D only): (r, theta, z) — natural for toroidal geometry.

dimensions.description: Dimensions in 2D or 3D space. Interpretation depends on the sibling coordinateSystem (default: cartesian). Cartesian: (x, y) or (x, y, z). Polar (2D only): (r, theta). Cylindrical (3D only): (r, theta, z) — natural for toroidal geometry.

velocity.description: Data describing a velocity in cartesian 2 or 3 dimensional space

twoDimensionalMatrix.description: Data a two dimensional matrix, created as an array of array, where the first coordinate in the X and the second the Y

dimensionWithTolerance.description: A dimension of with minimum, nominal, and maximum values
dimensionWithTolerance.title: dimensionWithTolerance

minimum.description: The minimum value of the dimension

nominal.description: The nominal value of the dimension

maximum.description: The maximum value of the dimension

excludeMinimum.description: True if the minimum value must be excluded from the range

excludeMaximum.description: True if the maximum value must be excluded from the range

unit.description: Optional SI unit string (e.g. 'H', 'F', 'V', 'A', 'Ohm', 'm', 'kg'). When absent, the unit is implied by the field name.

dimension.description: A dimension that can be either a simple number or a dimensionWithTolerance
dimension.title: dimension

columnShape.description: Shape of the column, also used for gaps

complexFieldPoint.description: Data describing the complex value of a field in a 2D or 3D space
complexFieldPoint.title: complexFieldPoint

turnIndex.description: If this field point is inside of a wire, this is the index of the turn

turnLength.description: If this field point is inside of a wire, this is the length of the turn

label.description: If this point has some special significance, can be identified with this label

point.description: The coordinates of the point of the field

real.description: Real value of the field at this point

imaginary.description: Imaginary value of the field at this point.

complexField.description: Data describing a field in a 2D or 3D space
complexField.title: complexField

frequency.description: Value of the field at this point

fieldPoint.description: Data describing the value of a field in a 2D or 3D space
fieldPoint.title: fieldPoint

turnIndex.description: If this field point is inside of a wire, this is the index of the turn

turnLength.description: If this field point is inside of a wire, this is the length of the turn

label.description: If this point has some special significance, can be identified with this label

point.description: The coordinates of the point of the field

rotation.description: Rotation of the rectangle defining the turn, in degrees

value.description: Value of the field at this point.

field.description: Data describing a field in a 2D or 3D space
field.title: field

frequency.description: Value of the field at this point

coordinateSystem.description: System in which dimensions and coordinates are expressed. Cartesian: (x, y) or (x, y, z). Polar: (r, theta) — 2D only. Cylindrical: (r, theta, z) — 3D only, natural for toroidal cores. Spherical is not used in magnetic-component description.
coordinateSystem.title: coordinateSystem

windingOrientation.description: Way in which the elements are oriented inside their parent
windingOrientation.title: windingOrientation

electricalType.description: Type of an electrical element in a coil
electricalType.title: electricalType

coilAlignment.description: Way in which elements are aligned inside their parent
coilAlignment.title: coilAlignment

windingStyle.description: Defines how a section or layer is wound
windingStyle.title: windingStyle

impedanceAtFrequency.description: An impedance value pinned to a specific frequency. The impedance may be expressed as a bare magnitude (Ohm) or as a structured impedancePoint that carries magnitude, phase and real/imaginary parts. Used by EMI-choke topologies and by designRequirements.minimumImpedance.
impedanceAtFrequency.title: impedanceAtFrequency

frequency.description: Frequency at which the impedance applies. Unit: Hz.

isolationSide.description: Tag to identify windings that are sharing the same ground
isolationSide.title: isolationSide
